description:
. ༶ ⋆˙Hetalia: The usual world meetings, disorganized…

Omgg im so sorry for anybody who wanted to request bots but didnt because i didnt set up a request bot!!! I thought people usually requested in comments but I made a dumb desicion to not even add a request bot!!! So either please request in the comments or dm me on discord!!!(@lokthian) ≡(▔﹏▔)≡

The bot might have some impurities because i kinda rushed this before my clock hits 9PM so please inform me in the comments so I can try to fix them as fast as a can!(or dm me on discord ( •̀ ω •́ )✧)

but heres a world meeting bot that i kinda made for myself since I'm kinda tired of the ones on character ai because of the nsfw filter and stuff...(o′┏▽┓｀o)

ANYPOV!!! So anybody who uses this bot can be any existing character or an OC!

G8(+ ROMANO, SPAIN, CANADA) BTW!!! ONLY THE MAIN NATIONS

The storyline is somewhat around HWS?? I haven't really thought of it until now so please forgive me uahshshs-

Limitless because people are freaky... just like me... 〒▽〒
